description: Build the shared layout components (Header navigation with mobile menu and Footer) and the Home/Landing page with hero section, feature highlights, community statistics, testimonials, and CTAs.
steps: Create components/layout/header.tsx - 'use client' component with responsive navigation bar. Include: Kiro Hub logo/text, nav links (Home, About, Features, How It Works, Tutorials, Community, Resources), mobile hamburger menu using state, theme toggle button (dark/light), search placeholder button. Use semantic HTML (header, nav elements). Make fully responsive with mobile menu. Add keyboard navigation support and aria labels. Use framer-motion for mobile menu animation with prefers-reduced-motion respect.

Create components/layout/footer.tsx - Server component with semantic footer element. Include: Kiro Hub branding, navigation links organized in columns (Product, Learn, Community, Resources), social media icon links (GitHub, Twitter/X, Discord), copyright notice, accessibility statement link. Use responsive grid layout.
Create components/layout/mobile-nav.tsx if needed for extracted mobile navigation logic
Update app/layout.tsx to include Header and Footer components wrapping {children} in a main element

Create app/page.tsx - The Home/Landing page with these sections: (1) Hero section with animated gradient background using framer-motion, headline 'Build Smarter with Kiro', subheadline about AI-native IDE, two CTA buttons (Get Started, Learn More), (2) Product overview section with brief Kiro description, (3) Feature highlights - 6 key features in responsive grid with icons from lucide-react, (4) Community statistics section showing numbers (developers, projects, contributions, etc.), (5) Testimonials section with 3 developer testimonials in cards, (6) Final CTA section. All sections use semantic HTML (section, article elements). All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion via framer-motion's useReducedMotion or media query. Mobile-first responsive design throughout.
Create components/home/feature-highlights.tsx - Can be server component with animated cards as client sub-components
Create components/home/stats-section.tsx - Community statistics with counter animations
Create components/home/cta-section.tsx - Final call to action
Run bun run build to verify
acceptance_criteria: Header renders with all navigation links and is responsive
Footer renders with organized link columns
Home page has hero, features, stats, testimonials, and CTA sections
All sections use semantic HTML elements
Animations use framer-motion with reduced-motion support
Mobile navigation works with hamburger menu
verification: Run 'bun run build' and confirm successful compilation with / route listed
